title: UnifaceOccurrence.getFieldTypes
breadcrumbs: APIs: Java Call-In Classes and Methods
text: UnifaceOccurrence.getFieldTypes This method returns the types of the occurrence’s fields. import com.rocketsoftware.uniface.jci.*; int[] getFieldTypes() Return Values Return the types of the occurrence’s fields. Description The constants used for Uniface field types are listed in the following table: Table 1. Field Type Constants Constant Meaning UTYPE_STRING Uniface string UTYPE_BOOLEAN Uniface boolean UTYPE_NUMERIC Uniface numeric UTYPE_FLOAT Uniface float UTYPE_DATE Uniface date UTYPE_TIME Uniface time UTYPE_DATETIME Uniface date time UTYPE_RAW Uniface raw UTYPE_IMAGE Uniface image Was this topic helpful?
